name: Raindrop.io MCP Server
what_it_does: Raindrop.io MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Raindrop — the cross-platform bookmark manager — searching and retrieving saved bookmarks, managing collections, adding new bookmarks, and integrating Raindrop's bookmark library into agent-driven content curation and research workflows.
use_cases: Searching saved bookmarks from research and knowledge agents
Retrieving bookmarks by topic or collection from content agents
Adding new bookmarks from web research agents
Managing bookmark collections from content organization agents
Finding previously saved resources from memory agents
Integrating personal bookmark library into AI workflow context
best_when: A Raindrop.io user needs AI access to their bookmark library — searching past-saved resources and integrating personal knowledge curation into agent workflows.
avoid_when: You use Pocket, Pinboard, or other bookmark services — use appropriate MCPs for those, or if you need general web search.

auth.notes: Raindrop OAuth token or test token required. Create app at app.raindrop.io/settings/integrations. Test tokens available without OAuth flow for personal use.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Raindrop free: unlimited bookmarks with basic features
pricing.paid_tiers: Raindrop Pro: $3/month for nested collections, duplicates detection
pricing.notes: Raindrop API is free for all users. MCP server is free open source. Community MCP from adeze.

known_agent_gotchas: OAuth token setup required — test token available for personal use without OAuth flow
Rate limit: 120 req/min — throttle for bulk bookmark operations
Collection IDs required for organized retrieval — flat search available
Community MCP from adeze — not official Raindrop integration
Bookmark search quality depends on tags and descriptions saved by user
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth token required — store securely. Community MCP. Personal bookmark data — GDPR applies. Raindrop EU-based.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth token. Community MCP. Personal data GDPR compliant.
